---
pagetitle: "CV — José C. Milisenda"
---

```{=html}
<style>
.cv-index { border: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color, #E7E3DC); border-radius: 10px; padding: 1rem 1.4rem 1.1rem; margin: 1.3rem 0 2.4rem; background: rgba(142,59,84,.035); }
.cv-index p { margin: 0 0 .5rem; font-family: "Spectral", serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.05rem; }
.cv-index ul { margin: 0; padding-left: 1.1rem; }
.cv-index ul ul { margin: .15rem 0 .35rem; }
.cv-index li { margin: .18rem 0; }
.cv-index a { border-bottom: none; }
.cv-index a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
</style>
```

::: {.content-visible when-profile="en"}

# Curriculum Vitae {.title}

[[Download PDF](assets/Milisenda_CV.pdf) · Updated 2026]{.hero-role}

::: {.cv-index}
Contents

- [Clinical activity](#clinical-activity)
- [Research](#research)
    - [Publications](#publications)
    - [Competitive funded projects](#projects)
    - [Doctoral thesis](#phd)
    - [Conference communications](#communications)
    - [Editorial boards](#editorial)
    - [Clinical trials (site PI)](#trials)
- [Education](#education)
- [Appointments](#appointments)
- [Teaching](#teaching)
- [Awards & fellowships](#awards)
- [Skills, service & memberships](#skills)
:::

## Clinical activity {#clinical-activity}

Reference physician for muscular and inherited metabolic diseases at Hospital Clínic de Barcelona — both intra-hospital (internal referrals from pulmonology, cardiology, surgery, endocrinology and others) and as a national and international referral for these conditions.

- Leads the **muscle-disease arm** of the Hospital Clínic muscular & metabolic diseases group (metabolic arm led by Dr. Pedro Moreno), coordinating multidisciplinary care across neurology, pneumology, cardiology, rehabilitation, dermatology, endocrinology, genetics and psychiatry.
- Runs a **monographic referral outpatient clinic** for adults with muscular and metabolic diseases (~280 active patients; ~80–90 new and ~450 follow-up visits per year), including structured transfer of adult patients from the pediatric Hospital Sant Joan de Déu.
- **Coordinates 100% of the group's diagnostic procedures and personally performs ~80%** in the Internal Medicine Day Hospital: muscle biopsy (~120–140/yr), nerve biopsy (15–20/yr), skin biopsy (7–10/yr) and forearm ischemia testing.
- Created and coordinates a **private biobank** (muscle, plasma, serum, DNA) at IDIBAPS — over **2,000 samples** — enabling national and international research collaborations; designed the standardized biopsy-request circuit now used across Catalonia, Spain and Latin America.
- Leads **weekly muscle-pathology sessions** (Fridays) with virtual participation from centers in Spain, Latin America and the USA.
- Active in general internal medicine (hospitalization ward and on-call duties).

**Care innovations**

- Introduced new therapies into Internal Medicine: enzyme-replacement therapy (Gaucher, Pompe), 3,4-diaminopyridine (congenital myasthenic syndromes), and anti–plasma cell therapy (teclistamab) for refractory idiopathic inflammatory myopathy, in collaboration with Hematology.
- Implemented **anti-human IgG immunohistochemistry** on muscle tissue as a new diagnostic technique.
- Optimized circuits for genetic testing and for research referral of undiagnosed patients.

**Reference networks & accreditations**

- Member of **CSUR** and **XUEC** accredited groups (Congenital Metabolic Diseases; Systemic Autoimmune Diseases).
- Contributor to two **ENMC international workshops** (2026): #293 (immune-checkpoint-inhibitor myotoxicity) and #294 (paraproteinemic myopathies).

## Research {#research}

### Publications {#publications}

*Selected below (name highlighted). The full, continuously updated list is generated from PubMed — see [complete list](#complete-list).*

::: {.pub .featured}
[**Milisenda JC**]{.me}, Pinal-Fernandez I, Lloyd TE, et al. The pattern of MHC class I expression in muscle biopsies from patients with myositis and other neuromuscular disorders. [*Rheumatology*. 2023.]{.venue}
:::
::: {.pub .featured}
[**Milisenda JC**]{.me}, Pinal-Fernandez I, Lloyd TE, Grau JM, Miller FW, Selva-O'Callaghan A, et al. Accumulation of autophagosome cargo protein p62 is common in idiopathic inflammatory myopathies. [*Clin Exp Rheumatol*. 2020.]{.venue}
:::
::: {.pub .featured}
Pinal-Fernandez I, Casal-Dominguez M, Derfoul A, [**Milisenda JC**]{.me}, et al. Machine-learning algorithms reveal unique gene-expression profiles in muscle biopsies from patients with different types of myositis. [*Ann Rheum Dis*. 2020.]{.venue}
:::
::: {.pub .featured}
Montagne JM, Zheng XA, Pinal-Fernandez I, [**Milisenda JC**]{.me}, et al. Ultra-efficient sequencing of T-cell receptor repertoires reveals shared responses in muscle from patients with myositis. [*EBioMedicine*. 2020.]{.venue}
:::
::: {.pub .featured}
Milisenda JC, Matas-García A. Pompe disease. [*Med Clin (Barc)*. 2025.]{.venue}
:::

#### Complete list {#complete-list}

{{< include _auto_publications.qmd >}}

### Competitive funded research projects {#projects}

::: {.cv-entry}
[**FIS PI24/00428** — Instituto de Salud Carlos III. *Molecular signature and 3D muscle models to establish etiology, biomarkers and therapeutics in inclusion body myositis.* Co-principal investigator (with G. Garrabou). €152,500.]{} · [2025–2027]{.date}
:::
::: {.cv-entry}
[**FEMI Proyectos 2022** — Spanish Society of Internal Medicine. *Digital muscle biopsy: transcriptomic analysis as an alternative to conventional histology in myositis.* Principal investigator. €27,456.]{} · [2023–2026]{.date}
:::
::: {.cv-entry}
[**PrometER 2023** — CIBERER / Instituto de Salud Carlos III. *Transcriptomic profile in systemic-sclerosis–associated myopathy.* Principal investigator. €19,782.]{} · [2024]{.date}
:::
::: {.cv-entry}
[Member of the funded **Consolidated Research Group (GRC)** on neuromuscular & inherited metabolic diseases — AGAUR, Generalitat de Catalunya (2021 SGR 01423), IDIBAPS.]{}
:::

### Doctoral thesis {#phd}

::: {.cv-entry}
[**PhD in Medicine**, *cum laude* — Universitat de Barcelona. Doctoral programme in Medicine and Translational Research. Advisor: Josep Maria Grau Junyent.]{} · [2019]{.date}
:::

### Conference communications {#communications}

Abstracts and oral communications at national and international meetings (author role noted).

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple" collapse="true" title="Show all communications"}
- **2026** — Aggregation of HARS1 and internalized antibodies in muscle biopsies of patients with antisynthetase syndrome. *(First author.)*
- **2026** — Muscle transcriptomic profile in patients with dermatomyositis without characteristic histopathology. *(First author.)*
- **2025** — Myeloid dendritic cell subsets characterize muscle of inclusion body myositis patients and correlate with disease features. *(Co-author.)*
- **2025** — Aggregation of HARS1 and internalized antibodies in muscle biopsies of patients with antisynthetase syndrome. *(Co-author.)*
- **2024** — Anti-Mi2 autoantibodies in dermatomyositis patients also recognize the autoimmune regulator (AIRE) protein. *(Co-author.)*
- **2024** — Specific transcriptomic profile associated with disease activity in muscle biopsies from patients with myositis. *(Co-author.)*
- **2024** — Antisynthetase autoantibodies disrupt the function of their target aminoacyl-tRNA synthetases in muscle. *(Co-author.)*
- **2024** — Comparative transcriptional profiling reveals shared pathway activation in Jo-1+ antisynthetase syndrome. *(Co-author.)*
- **2023** — Muscle pathology in patients with primary biliary cholangitis. *(First author.)*
- **2023** — Transcriptional derepression of CHD4/NuRD-regulated genes in the muscle of patients with dermatomyositis. *(Second author.)*
- **2023** — Transcriptomic profiles in muscle biopsies from systemic sclerosis patients with different autoantibodies. *(Second author.)*
- **2019** — The prevalence of p62 immunostaining in muscle biopsies from patients with myositis and non-inflammatory myopathies. *(First author.)*
- **2019** — Afectación gastrointestinal en pacientes con dermatomiositis: 3 casos y revisión de la literatura. *(Co-author.)*
- **2019** — Tumour-infiltrating lymphocyte quantification in cancer-associated dermatomyositis. *(Co-author.)*
- **2019** — Myositis autoantigen expression correlates with muscle regeneration but not autoantibody specificity. *(Co-author.)*
- **2019** — PD-1/PD-L1 inhibitor-associated myositis: characteristic histopathological muscle pattern. *(Co-author.)*
- **2018** — ANO5: three different phenotypes and a new histological pattern. *(Last author.)*
- **2018** — Long-term motor function in collagen VI-related myopathies. *(Co-author.)*
- **2018** — Miopatía necrosante con anticuerpos anti-HMGCoA. *(Co-author.)*
- **2018** — Hiperckemia y rabdomiólisis. *(Co-author.)*
- **2016** — Distinctive liver immunofluorescence pattern in statin-associated autoimmune myopathy with anti-HMGCR. *(Co-author.)*
- **2013** — Adult Pompe disease: screening in patients with myopathies of unknown etiology. *(Co-author.)*
- **2012** — Dermatomyositis presenting with severe subcutaneous edema: five cases and review of the literature. *(First author.)*
- **2012** — Leptomeningeal amyloidosis due to the transthyretin p.Ala25Thr mutation. *(Co-author.)*
- **2012** — Forearm ischemic exercise test (FIET): experience in an internal medicine department. *(Co-author.)*
:::

### Editorial boards {#editorial}

::: {.cv-entry}
[**Current Treatment Options in Rheumatology** — editorial board member. Indexed in Scopus (CiteScore; SJR quartile) and Web of Science.]{}
:::
::: {.cv-entry}
[**Discover Immunity** — editorial board member. Indexed in Dimensions, Google Scholar, ProQuest and Portico.]{}
:::

### Clinical trials — site principal investigator {#trials}

Principal investigator at Hospital Clínic for non-competitive multicenter (industry-sponsored) trials in inflammatory and mitochondrial myopathies.

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple" collapse="true" title="Show trials"}
- **Nipocalimab** in active idiopathic inflammatory myopathy (SPIREA, Phase 2) — Janssen-Cilag. 2024–2028.
- **Efgartigimod PH20 SC** in idiopathic inflammatory myopathy (Phase 2/3 and open-label extension) — Argenx. 2023–2026.
- **GLPG3667** in dermatomyositis (Phase 2) — Galapagos. 2023–2025.
- **IgPro20 (subcutaneous immunoglobulin, Hizentra)** in dermatomyositis (RECLAIIM) — CSL Behring. 2023.
- **AAV8 antibody seroprevalence** in late-onset Pompe disease — Astellas Gene Therapies. 2024–2028.
- **REN001** in primary mitochondrial myopathy (long-term safety) — Reneo Pharma / Orphan Reach. 2021–2024.
- **Elamipretide** in primary mitochondrial myopathy (Phase 3) — Stealth Biotherapeutics. 2022–2025.
:::

## Education {#education}

::: {.cv-entry}
[**PhD in Medicine**, *cum laude* — Universitat de Barcelona]{} · [2019]{.date}
:::
::: {.cv-entry}
[**Specialist in Internal Medicine** (MIR) — Hospital Clínic de Barcelona]{} · [2010–2015]{.date}
:::
::: {.cv-entry}
[**MD** — National University of Córdoba, Argentina]{} · [2003–2009]{.date}
:::
::: {.cv-entry}
[Postgraduate diplomas & master's: Molecular Medicine (Autoimmune Diseases, UB); *DIU de Myologie* (Pierre & Marie Curie, Paris VI); Medical Genetics (València); Inherited Metabolic Diseases (Santiago de Compostela); Lysosomal Diseases (Alcalá); Design & Statistics in Health Sciences (UAB).]{}
:::

## Appointments {#appointments}

::: {.cv-entry}
[**Senior Physician, Internal Medicine**, and **Head of the Unit of Neuromuscular, Mitochondrial and Autonomic Nervous System Diseases (UF-MNMA)** — Hospital Clínic de Barcelona]{} · [2017–present]{.date}
:::
::: {.cv-entry}
[**Associate Professor** — Faculty of Medicine & Health Sciences, Universitat de Barcelona]{} · [2018–present]{.date}
:::
::: {.cv-entry}
[**Research stays** — NIH / NIAMS, Bethesda, USA (postdoctoral 2021–2022; visiting 2017)]{}
:::

## Teaching {#teaching}

::: {.cv-entry}
[Associate Professor — *Clinical Semiology & Medical Ethics* (Medicine) and *Pathophysiology & Imaging* (Nursing), UB]{} · [2018–present]{.date}
:::
::: {.cv-entry}
[Coordinator & lecturer — Master's in Advanced Medical Competencies: *Autoimmune Diseases*, UB]{} · [2016–present]{.date}
:::

## Awards & fellowships {#awards}

::: {.cv-entry}
[**Emili Letang End-of-Residency Award**, Hospital Clínic — project on anti-mitochondrial M2 antibody myopathy]{} · [2015–2016]{.date}
:::
::: {.cv-entry}
[International research-stay fellowship, PhD programme *Medicina i Recerca Translacional*]{} · [2016–2017]{.date}
:::
::: {.cv-entry}
[Multiple best-oral-communication awards, national & Catalan internal-medicine congresses]{}
:::

## Skills, service & memberships {#skills}

::: {.cv-entry}
[**Data & methods** — statistical analysis (SPSS), reference management, GCP-certified for clinical trials.]{}
:::
::: {.cv-entry}
[**Societies** — Spanish Society of Internal Medicine (SEMI): Minority Diseases, Clinical Ultrasound, and Systemic Autoimmune Diseases groups.]{}
:::
::: {.cv-entry}
[**Languages** — Spanish (native), English (advanced), Catalan & French (intermediate).]{}
:::

:::

<!-- ==================== CATALÀ ==================== -->
::: {.content-visible when-profile="ca"}
# Currículum {.title}

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
Aquesta pàgina encara està en construcció en català. De moment, consulta la **[versió en anglès](../cv.html)**, més completa.
:::

[[Descarrega el PDF](assets/Milisenda_CV.pdf)]{.hero-role}
:::

<!-- ==================== ESPAÑOL ==================== -->
::: {.content-visible when-profile="es"}
# Currículum {.title}

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
Esta página todavía está en construcción en español. Por ahora, consulta la **[versión en inglés](../cv.html)**, más completa.
:::

[[Descargar PDF](assets/Milisenda_CV.pdf)]{.hero-role}
:::
